summary: The AI itinerary lacks adherence to critical wildlife activity timing and does not allow sufficient rest periods. It fails in geographic coherence with overly ambitious daily routes, leading to a scattered experience without the necessary focus on must-see attractions.

dimension_scores.finding: Wildlife activities are scheduled outside optimal times.
No dedicated rest periods; activities run continuously.
Drive times are underestimated with no traffic buffer.
Daily itineraries lack geographic focus, leading to inefficient travel.
dimension_scores.example: Day 2 includes locations far apart within park.

dimension_scores.finding: Most days have reasonable activity density, but lacking in rest breaks.
dimension_scores.example: Day 3: Kayaking and wildlife in distinct locations.

dimension_scores.finding: Overlook trail not specified, overlooking optimal viewing advice.
Departure day includes activities that risk flight timing.

hits: Includes arrival meal at Old Faithful.
misses: Late arrival activities after long travel.
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Scheduling evening viewing event right after arrival.

misses: No focus on early or late wildlife viewing.
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Activities span from early morning until late evening without rest.

day_analysis.golden_title: Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone + Hayden Sunset
hits: Includes kayaking as a diverse experience.
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Lack of focus on golden hour for Hayden Valley viewing.

day_analysis.golden_title: Geyser Loop — Old Faithful + Grand Prismatic
misses: No rest period after early extensive activity.
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Full activity load without accounting for fatigue.

day_analysis.golden_title: Norris Geyser Basin + Yellowstone Lake — Balanced Day
hits: Includes Yellowstone Lake for scenic downtime.
misses: Tower Fall viewpoint scheduled at non-ideal time.
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Tasking high-value scenic areas without sufficient time.

misses: Firehole Lake Drive unrelated to departure focus.
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Excessive activities scheduled on departure day.

top_failures.description: Wildlife activities are scheduled outside optimal viewing times, missing prime wildlife sightings.
top_failures.prompt_fix: Incorporate guidance to schedule wildlife viewing activities only during early morning and late afternoon/evening hours.

top_failures.description: The itinerary schedules activities back-to-back with no breaks, leading to an exhausting experience.
top_failures.prompt_fix: Include mandatory 1.5-2 hour rest periods in itineraries with 4+ activities or early start times.

top_failures.description: Drive times in the park are underestimated without accounting for potential wildlife jams or traffic.
top_failures.prompt_fix: Adjust drive time estimates by adding a 25-50% buffer over standard map times for all intra-park travel.

what_ai_got_right: Included a nice variety of geothermal and scenic locations.
Offered some unique experiences like kayaking.
Provided multiple dining options throughout the stay.

itinerary_prompt_changes: Enforce time-of-day guidance for wildlife viewing to ensure activities are scheduled during optimal hours.
Mandate inclusion of rest/free periods with a 1.5-2 hr minimum, particularly on days starting before 8 AM.
Add a buffer of 25-50% to all intra-park drive time estimates to account for variable conditions.
board_generation_changes: Ensure all must-have locations from the human's golden reference are included in AI-generated boards.
Improve AI understanding of sight sequencing, prioritizing activities that reflect local knowledge (e.g., Grand Prismatic overlook).
